query:
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS user_online_status (
  id INT AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
  userId INT NOT NULL UNIQUE,
  userName VARCHAR(255) NOT NULL,
  userRole ENUM('user', 'admin') DEFAULT 'user' NOT NULL,
  isOnline BOOLEAN DEFAULT FALSE NOT NULL,
  lastActivityAt BIGINT NOT NULL,
  currentPage VARCHAR(255),
  statusMessage VARCHAR(100) DEFAULT 'Disponível',
  INDEX online_user_idx (userId),
  INDEX online_status_idx (isOnline),
  INDEX online_role_status_idx (userRole, isOnline)
);

  id INT AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
  userId INT NOT NULL UNIQUE,
  userName VARCHAR(255) NOT NULL,
  userRole ENUM('user', 'admin') DEFAULT 'user' NOT NULL,
  isOnline BOOLEAN DEFAULT FALSE NOT NULL,
  lastActivityAt BIGINT NOT NULL,
  currentPage VARCHAR(255),
  statusMessage VARCHAR(100) DEFAULT 'Disponível',
  INDEX online_user_idx (userId),
  INDEX online_status_idx (isOnline),
  INDEX online_role_status_idx (userRole, isOnline)
);
